title: Wizard's Enchanced
body:
Enchances some of [Wizard's Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards-reborn) Textures



Changes:
- Armor
- Spells
- Crystals
- Wands
- Some Blocks
- Accessories
- Items
- UI Elements
